message:
🌱 Add k3s: certificate expired and rotate mission (#938)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "k3s-1621-certificate-expired-and-rotate",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "k3s: certificate expired and rotate",
+    "description": "certificate expired and rotate. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify k3s troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your k3s deployment:\n```bash\nk3s --version\nsystemctl status k3s\njournalctl -u k3s --no-pager --lines=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review k3s configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant k3s configuration:\n```bash\nk3s --version\nkubectl get nodes -o wide\nkubectl get pods -A\n```\nHi\n  **By default,k3s components' certificates is 1 year,those components include:kube-apiserver,scheduler,cloud-controller,K3s should rotate those certificates.**\n\n **K3s version: v1.17.4+k3s1**\n\nA clear and concise description of what you want to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for certificate expired and rotate",
+        "description": "I added some extra info-level printfs to a local build, and it appears to be checking properly:\n\n```\nJul  1 00:01:12 centos01 k3s: time=\"2021-07-01T00:01:12.397685015-07:00\" level=info msg=\"checking certificate: days=90\"\nJul  1 00:01:12 centos01 k3s: time=\"2021-07-01T00:01:12.398319926-07:00\"\n```yaml\nopenssl s_client -connect localhost:6443 -showcerts < /dev/null 2>&1 | openssl x509 -noout -enddate\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm certificate expired and rotate is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\njournalctl -u k3s --no-pager --lines=50 --since='5 minutes ago'\nkubectl get events -A --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I added some extra info-level printfs to a local build, and it appears to be checking properly:\n\n```\nJul  1 00:01:12 centos01 k3s: time=\"2021-07-01T00:01:12.397685015-07:00\" level=info msg=\"checking certificate: days=90\"\nJul  1 00:01:12 centos01 k3s: time=\"2021-07-01T00:01:12.398319926-07:00\" level=info msg=\"certificate expiration: is 2021-09-29 07:01:12.39831146 +0000 UTC after 2021-08-04",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "openssl s_client -connect localhost:6443 -showcerts < /dev/null 2>&1 | openssl x509 -noout -enddate",
+        "Jun  2 17:15:06 localhost k3s: E0602 17:15:06.593592    7212 reflector.go:153] k8s.io/client-go@v1.17.5-k3s1/tools/cache/reflector.go:105: Failed to list *v1.VolumeAttachment: Get \"https://127.0.0.1:6444/apis/storage.k8s.io/v1/volumeattachments?limit=500&resourceVersion=0\": x509: certificate has expired or is not yet valid: current time 2020-06-02T17:15:06Z is before 2022-04-26T23:02:59Z",
+        "client-admin.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nclient-auth-proxy.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nclient-ca.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 11 19:22:39 2030 GMT\nclient-cloud-controller.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nclient-controller.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nclient-k3s-controller.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nclient-kube-apiserver.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nclient-kube-proxy.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nclient-scheduler.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT\nrequest-header-ca.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 11 19:22:39 2030 GMT\nserver-ca.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 11 19:22:39 2030 GMT\nserving-kube-apiserver.crt\nnotAfter=Jul 13 19:22:39 2021 GMT"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "k3s",
+      "sandbox",
+      "orchestration",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "k3s"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/issues/1621",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 36,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "k3s",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running k3s cluster or a system where k3s can be installed."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:37:25.637Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
